title: ranunculus acris subsp. acris
intro: Ranunculus acris subsp. acris, also known as the early buttercup, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Ranunculaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which may be attributed to the presence of alkaloids and flavonoids. Ranunculus acris subsp. acris has been reported to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation and pain, as well as exhibiting antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity.
